div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p: the session was ALREADY a core dump (paged out at write time)

div.style: color: rgb(58, 42, 102) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
manifest = page table
roles + digests + descriptors + quarantine state (small)

div.style: color: rgb(58, 42, 102) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
CAS = swap device
dedup'd, content-addressed bytes (cold)

div.style: color: rgb(51, 66, 79) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
frozen world-version
(no more writes will ever happen)

div.style: color: rgb(122, 62, 18) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Finished session — ~350k tokens of (system, user, assistant, tool)

div.style: color: rgb(107, 84, 16) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(110, 31, 27) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: paste ALL 350k into a fresh window

div.style: color: rgb(110, 31, 27) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
pays AGAIN, per question:
• input tokens re-billed (a cache read is still metered)
• prefill latency on a cache miss
• may exceed the context ceiling
• RE-CONTAMINATION: every poisoned byte pasted back ungated

div.style: color: rgb(28, 82, 48) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: demand-page ONLY the working set the question touches

div.style: color: rgb(70, 88, 106) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: ⚡ re-output a stored result = 0 model tokens (rung 0)
